selected_title: Human resource outsourcing in high technology companies in Taiwan
question: What operational artifact in “Human resource outsourcing in high technology companies in Taiwan” could make the Outsourcing feedback loop auditable?

evidence_spans.text: This paper discusses the developments and practices of human resource outsourcing in high technology companies in Taiwan. It is found that human resource outsourcing will be a clear trend when the high technology industries are well developed in Taiwan. There are several different kinds of outsourcing strategy and patterns for different types of work in the companies. Some challenges for future developments of human resource outsourcing are discussed.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Outsourcing, Business through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 68 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
